_comment: Verified 2026-07-01. Input is contenteditable div.chat-input-editor[role='textbox']. No send button visible in DOM (no aria-label, no class) — relies on Enter-key submission. Stop indicator div.send-button-container.stop appears during generation (thinking/tool calls) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Response container div.chat-content-item.chat-content-item-assistant appears after message sent. Clean answer text in div.markdown-container (excludes thinking/tool-call text in div.toolcall-content).
